title: Bow & Crossbow Reworked
description: A clean rework of the bow and crossbow with improved visuals.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929b81cbf62cff0a32e60f2cb00d19782013989c.png)
Bow and Crossbow Reworked improves the visual appearance of Minecraft's ranged weapons
while keeping the vanilla style intact.
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6242809833594cf6010647aa983c333917ffea47.png)
Features:
• Redesigned bow and crossbow textures
• Smooth pulling animations
• Vanilla-friendly style
• No gameplay changes
• Works on all modern versions

This resource pack only changes item visuals.
